title: Ghost Rider
content:
{{Disambiguation | logo = [[File:Ghost Rider Vol 10 Logo.png|300px|center]] | main_article1 = [[Johnny Blaze]]; Avengers Vol 8 36 Ghost Rider Timeless Variant.jpg | description = The Ghost Rider is a supernatural agent indwelled by a [[Spirits of Vengeance|Spirit of Vengeance]] who mounts a hellish vehicle to bring upon justice to evil ones with his [[Penance Stare]]. Bike rider and stunt performer '''[[Johnny Blaze]]''' has become the Ghost Rider by striking a pact with the demon-lord [[Mephisto]] to have his dying soul bonded with that of the devil [[Zarathos]]. Ever since, Blaze has been connected with misadventures in hellish domains. Blaze's half-brother '''[[Danny Ketch]]''' ascended as a new Ghost Rider, as his spirit and motorcycle were imbued with its powers through the [[Medallion of Power]]. From the criminal underworld, '''[[Alejandra Jones]]''' was chosen as Blaze's replacement after he gave up his demonic powers, being tutored by him. '''[[Robbie Reyes]]''', an orphan from [[Los Angeles]] who struggled to take care of his [[Gabe Reyes|younger brother]], has been turned into an all-new Ghost Rider through his [[Hell Charger]] and a corrupting connection with his deceased criminal uncle [[Eli Morrow]]. Reyes became a central figure in the [[Avengers]] and in the history of super-humans on Earth. {{Navigation Gallery | size = 200 | list = [[Danny Ketch]]
(Currently deceased); Ghost Rider Danny Ketch Vol 1 1 Textless.jpg [[Alejandra Jones]]
